title: ServerCoreX
description: All-in-one control panel plugin for managing players, performance, moderation, and more!
body:
ServerCoreX is a powerful all-in-one admin tool designed for Minecraft server owners who want full control without leaving the game.
With its modern in-game GUI, ServerCoreX allows you to manage players, reports, PvP settings, voice chat (beta), performance stats, maintenance mode, plugin control, and more — all from one intuitive interface.

Ideal for Towny, SMP, and Factions servers.

Features:

Player & PvP Manager (mute, ban, kick, freeze, PvP toggle)

Report system with in-game tracking

Maintenance mode & plugin toggler

Performance monitor (TPS, RAM usage)

Voice chat support (experimental)

Web panel integration (optional)

Discord webhook support (optional)

Admin-only access & permissions
Supported version: 1.19–1.20.x

Make your admin life easier — one panel to rule them all.

*NOT SUPPORT ENGLİSH FOR NOW
